ocr_findings.description: The AI用語 table (用語/説明 two-column format) is rendered in markdown pipe-table format. Row content matches image accurately. Minor: multi-line cell content for 機械学習 and ディープラーニング rows uses line breaks inside cells, which OCR captures correctly.
The nested hierarchy diagram for AI関連の重要用語 (AI→機械学習→ニューラルネットワーク→ディープラーニング→生成AI) is an image placeholder; the table above the diagram adequately covers the same information.

reviewer_notes: Page covers AI最重要用語 table and 機械学習/教師あり学習 sections. Table structure correctly reproduced in markdown. All cell text matches image. The visual hierarchy diagram is image-replaced but conceptually covered by the table. No high or med issues.
